heading: Rules and regulations
label: 4020 Rules and regulations
text: The Secretary, with the concurrence of the Attorney General, shall promulgate such rules and regulations as are necessary to carry out the purposes of this chapter.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in original “this Act”, meaning , , , which enacted this chapter and and , Banks and Banking, amended and sections 372 and 1843 of Title 12, and enacted provisions set out as notes under sections 1, 4001, and 4011 of this title and sections 1841 and 1843 of Title 12.
